This document is an electronic record controlled by the Information Technology Act of 2000 and any rules promulgated thereunder. Neither physical nor digital signatures are necessary for this electronic record because it is produced by a computer system. This Refund and Cancellation Policy outlines the guidelines and procedures for processing refunds and cancellations for products and services available on the Edgistify website. Refund Policy At Edgistify, we strive to ensure customer satisfaction with our products and services. However, in the event that you are not satisfied with a purchase, you may request a refund in accordance with the following terms: Eligibility for Refund Refunds are only applicable under the following circumstances: - The product/service received is defective or not as described. - The product/service does not meet the agreed specifications or standards. - The service was not rendered or was rendered unsatisfactorily. - A duplicate transaction was made. Refund Process To initiate a refund, please contact our customer support team at [email protected] within 7 days of receiving the product/service. You will be required to provide proof of purchase and a detailed explanation of the reason for the refund request.
